translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Adam, Sheth, Enosh,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Kenan, Mahalaleel, Jered,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Henoch, Methuselah, Lamech,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Japheth; Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Gomer; Ashchenaz, and Riphath, and Togarmah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Javan; Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Ham; Cush, and Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raamah, and Sabtecha. And the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Cush begat Nimrod: he began to be mighty upon the earth.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Mizraim begat Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Pathrusim, and Casluhim, (of whom came the Philistines,) and Caphthorim.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Canaan begat Zidon his firstborn, and Heth,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The Jebusite also, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Shem; Elam, and Asshur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram, and Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Meshech.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Arphaxad begat Shelah, and Shelah begat Eber.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And unto Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg; because in his days the earth was divided: and his brother’s name was Joktan.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Joktan begat Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Hadoram also, and Uzal, and Diklah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Shem, Arphaxad, Shelah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Eber, Peleg, Reu,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Serug, Nahor, Terah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Abram; the same is Abraham.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Abraham; Isaac, and Ishmael.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These are their generations: The firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth; then Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Mishma, and Dumah, Massa, Hadad, and Tema,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These are the sons of Ishmael.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Now the sons of Keturah, Abraham’s concubine: she bare Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah. And the sons of Jokshan; Sheba, and Dedan.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Midian; Ephah, and Epher, and Henoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these are the sons of Keturah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Abraham begat Isaac. The sons of Isaac; Esau and Israel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Esau; Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Eliphaz; Teman, and Omar, Zephi, and Gatam, Kenaz, and Timna, and Amalek.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Reuel; Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Seir; Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezar, and Dishan.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Lotan; Hori, and Homam: and Timna was Lotan’s sister.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Shobal; Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon; Aiah, and Anah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Anah; Dishon. And the sons of Dishon; Amram, and Eshban, and Ithran, and Cheran.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Ezer; Bilhan, and Zavan, and Jakan. The sons of Dishan; Uz, and Aran.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Now these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom before any king reigned over the children of Israel; Bela the son of Beor: and the name of his city was Dinhabah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And when Bela was dead, Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his stead.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And when Jobab was dead, Husham of the land of the Temanites reigned in his stead.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And when Husham was dead, Hadad the son of Bedad, which smote Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Avith.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And when Hadad was dead, Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And when Samlah was dead, Shaul of Rehoboth by the river reigned in his stead.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And when Shaul was dead, Baalhanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And when Baalhanan was dead, Hadad reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Pai; and his wife’s name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Hadad died also. And the dukes of Edom were; duke Timnah, duke Aliah, duke Jetheth,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Duke Aholibamah, duke Elah, duke Pinon,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Duke Kenaz, duke Teman, duke Mibzar,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Duke Magdiel, duke Iram. These are the dukes of Edom.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These are the sons of Israel; Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah, Issachar, and Zebulun,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Dan, Joseph, and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Judah; Er, and Onan, and Shelah: which three were born unto him of the daughter of Shua the Canaanitess. And Er, the firstborn of Judah, was evil in the sight of the LORD; and he slew him.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Tamar his daughter in law bore him Pharez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah were five.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Pharez; Hezron, and Hamul.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Zerah; Zimri, and Ethan, and Heman, and Calcol, and Dara: five of them in all.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Carmi; Achar, the troubler of Israel, who transgressed in the thing accursed.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Ethan; Azariah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons also of Hezron, that were born unto him; Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ram begat Amminadab; and Amminadab begat Nahshon, prince of the children of Judah;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Nahshon begat Salma, and Salma begat Boaz,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Boaz begat Obed, and Obed begat Jesse,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Jesse begat his firstborn Eliab, and Abinadab the second, and Shimma the third,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Nethaneel the fourth, Raddai the fifth,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Ozem the sixth, David the seventh:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Whose sisters were Zeruiah, and Abigail. And the sons of Zeruiah; Abishai, and Joab, and Asahel, three.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Abigail bare Amasa: and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmeelite.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Caleb the son of Hezron begat children of Azubah his wife, and of Jerioth: her sons are these; Jesher, and Shobab, and Ardon.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And when Azubah was dead, Caleb took unto him Ephrath, which bare him Hur.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Hur begat Uri, and Uri begat Bezaleel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead, whom he married when he was threescore years old; and she bare him Segub.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Segub begat Jair, who had three and twenty cities in the land of Gilead.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And he took Geshur, and Aram, with the towns of Jair, from them, with Kenath, and the towns thereof, even threescore cities. All these belonged to the sons of Machir the father of Gilead.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And after that Hezron was dead in Calebephratah, then Abiah Hezron’s wife bare him Ashur the father of Tekoa.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron were, Ram the firstborn, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem, and Ahijah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Jerahmeel had also another wife, whose name was Atarah; she was the mother of Onam.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Ram the firstborn of Jerahmeel were, Maaz, and Jamin, and Eker.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Onam were, Shammai, and Jada. And the sons of Shammai; Nadab, and Abishur.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the name of the wife of Abishur was Abihail, and she bare him Ahban, and Molid.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Nadab; Seled, and Appaim: but Seled died without children.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Appaim; Ishi. And the sons of Ishi; Sheshan. And the children of Sheshan; Ahlai.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Jada the brother of Shammai; Jether, and Jonathan: and Jether died without children.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Jonathan; Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Now Sheshan had no sons, but daughters. And Sheshan had a servant, an Egyptian, whose name was Jarha.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant to wife; and she bare him Attai.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Attai begat Nathan, and Nathan begat Zabad,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Zabad begat Ephlal, and Ephlal begat Obed,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Obed begat Jehu, and Jehu begat Azariah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Azariah begat Helez, and Helez begat Eleasah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Eleasah begat Sisamai, and Sisamai begat Shallum,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Shallum begat Jekamiah, and Jekamiah begat Elishama.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Now the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel were, Mesha his firstborn, which was the father of Ziph; and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Hebron; Korah, and Tappuah, and Rekem, and Shema.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Shema begat Raham, the father of Jorkoam: and Rekem begat Shammai.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the son of Shammai was Maon: and Maon was the father of Bethzur.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ephah, Caleb’s concubine, bare Haran, and Moza, and Gazez: and Haran begat Gazez.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Jahdai; Regem, and Jotham, and Gesham, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Maachah, Caleb’s concubine, bare Sheber, and Tirhanah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: She bare also Shaaph the father of Madmannah, Sheva the father of Machbenah, and the father of Gibea: and the daughter of Caleb was Achsa.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These were the sons of Caleb the son of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah; Shobal the father of Kirjathjearim,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Salma the father of Bethlehem, Hareph the father of Bethgader.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Shobal the father of Kirjathjearim had sons; Haroeh, and half of the Manahethites.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the families of Kirjathjearim; the Ithrites, and the Puhites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; of them came the Zareathites, and the Eshtaulites.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Salma; Bethlehem, and the Netophathites, Ataroth, the house of Joab, and half of the Manahethites, the Zorites.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the families of the scribes which dwelt at Jabez; the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, and Suchathites. These are the Kenites that came of Hemath, the father of the house of Rechab.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Now these were the sons of David, which were born unto him in Hebron; the firstborn Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jezreelitess; the second Daniel, of Abigail the Carmelitess:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The third, Absalom the son of Maachah the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur: the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The fifth, Shephatiah of Abital: the sixth, Ithream by Eglah his wife.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These six were born unto him in Hebron; and there he reigned seven years and six months: and in Jerusalem he reigned thirty and three years.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And these were born unto him in Jerusalem; Shimea, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon, four, of Bathshua the daughter of Ammiel:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Ibhar also, and Elishama, and Eliphelet,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These were all the sons of David, beside the sons of the concubines, and Tamar their sister.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Solomon’s son was Rehoboam, Abia his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Amon his son, Josiah his son.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Josiah were, the firstborn Johanan, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Jeconiah; Assir, Salathiel his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Malchiram also, and Pedaiah, and Shenazar, Jecamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Pedaiah were, Zerubbabel, and Shimei: and the sons of Zerubbabel; Meshullam, and Hananiah, and Shelomith their sister:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Hashubah, and Ohel, and Berechiah, and Hasadiah, Jushabhesed, five.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Hananiah; Pelatiah, and Jesaiah: the sons of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sons of Obadiah, the sons of Shechaniah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Shechaniah; Shemaiah: and the sons of Shemaiah; Hattush, and Igeal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Neariah; Elioenai, and Hezekiah, and Azrikam, three.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Elioenai were, Hodaiah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Johanan, and Dalaiah, and Anani, seven.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Judah; Pharez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Reaiah the son of Shobal begat Jahath; and Jahath begat Ahumai, and Lahad. These are the families of the Zorathites.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And these were of the father of Etam; Jezreel, and Ishma, and Idbash: and the name of their sister was Hazelelponi:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Penuel the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These are the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah, the father of Bethlehem.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ashur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Naarah bare him Ahuzam, and Hepher, and Temeni, and Haahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Helah were, Zereth, and Jezoar, and Ethnan.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Coz begat Anub, and Zobebah, and the families of Aharhel the son of Harum.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Jabez was more honourable than his brethren: and his mother called his name Jabez, saying, Because I bare him with sorrow.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying, Oh that thou wouldest bless me indeed, and enlarge my coast, and that thine hand might be with me, and that thou wouldest keep me from evil, that it may not grieve me! And God granted him that which he requested.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Chelub the brother of Shuah begat Mehir, which was the father of Eshton.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Eshton begat Bethrapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Irnahash. These are the men of Rechah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Kenaz; Othniel, and Seraiah: and the sons of Othniel; Hathath.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Meonothai begat Ophrah: and Seraiah begat Joab, the father of the valley of Charashim; for they were craftsmen.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh; Iru, Elah, and Naam: and the sons of Elah, even Kenaz.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Jehaleleel; Ziph, and Ziphah, Tiria, and Asareel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Ezra were, Jether, and Mered, and Epher, and Jalon: and she bare Miriam, and Shammai, and Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And his wife Jehudijah bare Jered the father of Gedor, and Heber the father of Socho, and Jekuthiel the father of Zanoah. And these are the sons of Bithiah the daughter of Pharaoh, which Mered took.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of his wife Hodiah the sister of Naham, the father of Keilah the Garmite, and Eshtemoa the Maachathite.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Shimon were, Amnon, and Rinnah, Benhanan, and Tilon. And the sons of Ishi were, Zoheth, and Benzoheth.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Shelah the son of Judah were, Er the father of Lecah, and Laadah the father of Mareshah, and the families of the house of them that wrought fine linen, of the house of Ashbea,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Jokim, and the men of Chozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who had the dominion in Moab, and Jashubilehem. And these are ancient things.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These were the potters, and those that dwelt among plants and hedges: there they dwelt with the king for his work.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Simeon were, Nemuel, and Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, and Shaul:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Shallum his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Mishma; Hamuel his son, Zacchur his son, Shimei his son.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brethren had not many children, neither did all their family multiply, like to the children of Judah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they dwelt at Beersheba, and Moladah, and Hazarshual,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And at Bilhah, and at Ezem, and at Tolad,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And at Bethuel, and at Hormah, and at Ziklag,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And at Bethmarcaboth, and Hazarsusim, and at Bethbirei, and at Shaaraim. These were their cities unto the reign of David.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And their villages were, Etam, and Ain, Rimmon, and Tochen, and Ashan, five cities:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And all their villages that were round about the same cities, unto Baal. These were their habitations, and their genealogy.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Meshobab, and Jamlech, and Joshah, the son of Amaziah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Joel, and Jehu the son of Josibiah, the son of Seraiah, the son of Asiel,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Elioenai, and Jaakobah, and Jeshohaiah, and Asaiah, and Adiel, and Jesimiel, and Benaiah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ziza the son of Shiphi, the son of Allon, the son of Jedaiah, the son of Shimri, the son of Shemaiah;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These mentioned by their names were princes in their families: and the house of their fathers increased greatly.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they went to the entrance of Gedor, even unto the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they found fat pasture and good, and the land was wide, and quiet, and peaceable; for they of Ham had dwelt there of old.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And these written by name came in the days of Hezekiah king of Judah, and smote their tents, and the habitations that were found there, and destroyed them utterly unto this day, and dwelt in their rooms: because there was pasture there for their flocks.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And some of them, even of the sons of Simeon, five hundred men, went to mount Seir, having for their captains Pelatiah, and Neariah, and Rephaiah, and Uzziel, the sons of Ishi.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they smote the rest of the Amalekites that were escaped, and dwelt there unto this day.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Now the sons of Reuben the firstborn of Israel, (for he was the firstborn; but, forasmuch as he defiled his father’s bed, his birthright was given unto the sons of Joseph the son of Israel: and the genealogy is not to be reckoned after the birthright.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: For Judah prevailed above his brethren, and of him came the chief ruler; but the birthright was Joseph’s:)

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons, I say, of Reuben the firstborn of Israel were, Hanoch, and Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Joel; Shemaiah his son, Gog his son, Shimei his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Micah his son, Reaia his son, Baal his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Beerah his son, whom Tilgathpilneser king of Assyria carried away captive: he was prince of the Reubenites.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And his brethren by their families, when the genealogy of their generations was reckoned, were the chief, Jeiel, and Zechariah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Bela the son of Azaz, the son of Shema, the son of Joel, who dwelt in Aroer, even unto Nebo and Baalmeon:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And eastward he inhabited unto the entering in of the wilderness from the river Euphrates: because their cattle were multiplied in the land of Gilead.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And in the days of Saul they made war with the Hagarites, who fell by their hand: and they dwelt in their tents throughout all the east land of Gilead.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the children of Gad dwelt over against them, in the land of Bashan unto Salcah:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Joel the chief, and Shapham the next, and Jaanai, and Shaphat in Bashan.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And their brethren of the house of their fathers were, Michael, and Meshullam, and Sheba, and Jorai, and Jachan, and Zia, and Heber, seven.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These are the children of Abihail the son of Huri, the son of Jaroah, the son of Gilead, the son of Michael, the son of Jeshishai, the son of Jahdo, the son of Buz;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Ahi the son of Abdiel, the son of Guni, chief of the house of their fathers.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they dwelt in Gilead in Bashan, and in her towns, and in all the suburbs of Sharon, upon their borders.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: All these were reckoned by genealogies in the days of Jotham king of Judah, and in the days of Jeroboam king of Israel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Reuben, and the Gadites, and half the tribe of Manasseh, of valiant men, men able to bear buckler and sword, and to shoot with bow, and skilful in war, were four and forty thousand seven hundred and threescore, that went out to the war.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they made war with the Hagarites, with Jetur, and Nephish, and Nodab.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they were helped against them, and the Hagarites were delivered into their hand, and all that were with them: for they cried to God in the battle, and he was intreated of them; because they put their trust in him.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they took away their cattle; of their camels fifty thousand, and of sheep two hundred and fifty thousand, and of asses two thousand, and of men an hundred thousand.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: For there fell down many slain, because the war was of God. And they dwelt in their steads until the captivity.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the children of the half tribe of Manasseh dwelt in the land: they increased from Bashan unto Baalhermon and Senir, and unto mount Hermon.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And these were the heads of the house of their fathers, even Epher, and Ishi, and Eliel, and Azriel, and Jeremiah, and Hodaviah, and Jahdiel, mighty men of valour, famous men, and heads of the house of their fathers.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they transgressed against the God of their fathers, and went a whoring after the gods of the people of the land, whom God destroyed before them.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the God of Israel stirred up the spirit of Pul king of Assyria, and the spirit of Tilgathpilneser king of Assyria, and he carried them away, even the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half tribe of Manasseh, and brought them unto Halah, and Habor, and Hara, and to the river Gozan, unto this day.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Levi; Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Kohath; Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the children of Amram; Aaron, and Moses, and Miriam. The sons also of Aaron; Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Eleazar begat Phinehas, Phinehas begat Abishua,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Abishua begat Bukki, and Bukki begat Uzzi,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Uzzi begat Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begat Meraioth,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Meraioth begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Ahimaaz,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ahimaaz begat Azariah, and Azariah begat Johanan,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Johanan begat Azariah, (he it is that executed the priest’s office in the temple that Solomon built in Jerusalem:)

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Azariah begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Shallum,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Shallum begat Hilkiah, and Hilkiah begat Azariah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Azariah begat Seraiah, and Seraiah begat Jehozadak,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Jehozadak went into captivity, when the LORD carried away Judah and Jerusalem by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Levi; Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And these be the names of the sons of Gershom; Libni, and Shimei.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Kohath were, Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Merari; Mahli, and Mushi. And these are the families of the Levites according to their fathers.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Of Gershom; Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeaterai his son.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Kohath; Amminadab his son, Korah his son, Assir his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Elkanah his son, and Ebiasaph his son, and Assir his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Shaul his son.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Elkanah; Amasai, and Ahimoth.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: As for Elkanah: the sons of Elkanah; Zophai his son, and Nahath his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elkanah his son.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Samuel; the firstborn Vashni, and Abiah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Merari; Mahli, Libni his son, Shimei his son, Uzza his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Shimea his son, Haggiah his son, Asaiah his son.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And these are they whom David set over the service of song in the house of the LORD, after that the ark had rest.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they ministered before the dwelling place of the tabernacle of the congregation with singing, until Solomon had built the house of the LORD in Jerusalem: and then they waited on their office according to their order.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And these are they that waited with their children. Of the sons of the Kohathites: Heman a singer, the son of Joel, the son of Shemuel,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The son of Elkanah, the son of Jeroham, the son of Eliel, the son of Toah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The son of Zuph, the son of Elkanah, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The son of Elkanah, the son of Joel, the son of Azariah, the son of Zephaniah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The son of Tahath, the son of Assir, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, the son of Israel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And his brother Asaph, who stood on his right hand, even Asaph the son of Berachiah, the son of Shimea,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The son of Michael, the son of Baaseiah, the son of Malchiah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The son of Ethni, the son of Zerah, the son of Adaiah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The son of Ethan, the son of Zimmah, the son of Shimei,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The son of Jahath, the son of Gershom, the son of Levi.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And their brethren the sons of Merari stood on the left hand: Ethan the son of Kishi, the son of Abdi, the son of Malluch,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The son of Hashabiah, the son of Amaziah, the son of Hilkiah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The son of Amzi, the son of Bani, the son of Shamer,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The son of Mahli, the son of Mushi, the son of Merari, the son of Levi.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Their brethren also the Levites were appointed unto all manner of service of the tabernacle of the house of God.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: But Aaron and his sons offered upon the altar of the burnt offering, and on the altar of incense, and were appointed for all the work of the place most holy, and to make an atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant of God had commanded.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And these are the sons of Aaron; Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Zadok his son, Ahimaaz his son.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Now these are their dwelling places throughout their castles in their coasts, of the sons of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites: for theirs was the lot.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they gave them Hebron in the land of Judah, and the suburbs thereof round about it.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: But the fields of the city, and the villages thereof, they gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And to the sons of Aaron they gave the cities of Judah, namely, Hebron, the city of refuge, and Libnah with her suburbs, and Jattir, and Eshtemoa, with their suburbs,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Hilen with her suburbs, Debir with her suburbs,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ashan with her suburbs, and Bethshemesh with her suburbs:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And out of the tribe of Benjamin; Geba with her suburbs, and Alemeth with her suburbs, and Anathoth with her suburbs. All their cities throughout their families were thirteen cities.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And unto the sons of Kohath, which were left of the family of that tribe, were cities given out of the half tribe, namely, out of the half tribe of Manasseh, by lot, ten cities.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And to the sons of Gershom throughout their families out of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and out of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Unto the sons of Merari were given by lot, throughout their families, out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the children of Israel gave to the Levites these cities with their suburbs.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they gave by lot out of the tribe of the children of Judah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, and out of the tribe of the children of Benjamin, these cities, which are called by their names.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the residue of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their coasts out of the tribe of Ephraim.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they gave unto them, of the cities of refuge, Shechem in mount Ephraim with her suburbs; they gave also Gezer with her suburbs,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Jokmeam with her suburbs, and Bethhoron with her suburbs,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Aijalon with her suburbs, and Gathrimmon with her suburbs:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And out of the half tribe of Manasseh; Aner with her suburbs, and Bileam with her suburbs, for the family of the remnant of the sons of Kohath.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Unto the sons of Gershom were given out of the family of the half tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan with her suburbs, and Ashtaroth with her suburbs:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And out of the tribe of Issachar; Kedesh with her suburbs, Daberath with her suburbs,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ramoth with her suburbs, and Anem with her suburbs:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And out of the tribe of Asher; Mashal with her suburbs, and Abdon with her suburbs,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Hukok with her suburbs, and Rehob with her suburbs:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And out of the tribe of Naphtali; Kedesh in Galilee with her suburbs, and Hammon with her suburbs, and Kirjathaim with her suburbs.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Unto the rest of the children of Merari were given out of the tribe of Zebulun, Rimmon with her suburbs, Tabor with her suburbs:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And on the other side Jordan by Jericho, on the east side of Jordan, were given them out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer in the wilderness with her suburbs, and Jahzah with her suburbs,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Kedemoth also with her suburbs, and Mephaath with her suburbs:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And out of the tribe of Gad; Ramoth in Gilead with her suburbs, and Mahanaim with her suburbs,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Heshbon with her suburbs, and Jazer with her suburbs.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Now the sons of Issachar were, Tola, and Puah, Jashub, and Shimrom, four.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Tola; Uzzi, and Rephaiah, and Jeriel, and Jahmai, and Jibsam, and Shemuel, heads of their father’s house, to wit, of Tola: they were valiant men of might in their generations; whose number was in the days of David two and twenty thousand and six hundred.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Uzzi; Izrahiah: and the sons of Izrahiah; Michael, and Obadiah, and Joel, Ishiah, five: all of them chief men.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And with them, by their generations, after the house of their fathers, were bands of soldiers for war, six and thirty thousand men: for they had many wives and sons.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And their brethren among all the families of Issachar were valiant men of might, reckoned in all by their genealogies fourscore and seven thousand.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Benjamin; Bela, and Becher, and Jediael, three.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Bela; Ezbon, and Uzzi, and Uzziel, and Jerimoth, and Iri, five; heads of the house of their fathers, mighty men of valour; and were reckoned by their genealogies twenty and two thousand and thirty and four.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Becher; Zemira, and Joash, and Eliezer, and Elioenai, and Omri, and Jerimoth, and Abiah, and Anathoth, and Alameth. All these are the sons of Becher.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the number of them, after their genealogy by their generations, heads of the house of their fathers, mighty men of valour, was twenty thousand and two hundred.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons also of Jediael; Bilhan: and the sons of Bilhan; Jeush, and Benjamin, and Ehud, and Chenaanah, and Zethan, and Tharshish, and Ahishahar.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: All these the sons of Jediael, by the heads of their fathers, mighty men of valour, were seventeen thousand and two hundred soldiers, fit to go out for war and battle.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Shuppim also, and Huppim, the children of Ir, and Hushim, the sons of Aher.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Naphtali; Jahziel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shallum, the sons of Bilhah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Manasseh; Ashriel, whom she bare: (but his concubine the Aramitess bare Machir the father of Gilead:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Machir took to wife the sister of Huppim and Shuppim, whose sister’s name was Maachah;) and the name of the second was Zelophehad: and Zelophehad had daughters.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Maachah the wife of Machir bare a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rakem.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Ulam; Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And his sister Hammoleketh bare Ishod, and Abiezer, and Mahalah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Shemidah were, Ahian, and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Ephraim; Shuthelah, and Bered his son, and Tahath his son, and Eladah his son, and Tahath his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Zabad his son, and Shuthelah his son, and Ezer, and Elead, whom the men of Gath that were born in that land slew, because they came down to take away their cattle.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ephraim their father mourned many days, and his brethren came to comfort him.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And when he went in to his wife, she conceived, and bare a son, and he called his name Beriah, because it went evil with his house.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: (And his daughter was Sherah, who built Bethhoron the nether, and the upper, and Uzzensherah.)

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Rephah was his son, also Resheph, and Telah his son, and Tahan his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Laadan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Non his son, Jehoshuah his son,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And their possessions and habitations were, Bethel and the towns thereof, and eastward Naaran, and westward Gezer, with the towns thereof; Shechem also and the towns thereof, unto Gaza and the towns thereof:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And by the borders of the children of Manasseh, Bethshean and her towns, Taanach and her towns, Megiddo and her towns, Dor and her towns. In these dwelt the children of Joseph the son of Israel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Asher; Imnah, and Isuah, and Ishuai, and Beriah, and Serah their sister.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Beriah; Heber, and Malchiel, who is the father of Birzavith.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Heber begat Japhlet, and Shomer, and Hotham, and Shua their sister.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Japhlet; Pasach, and Bimhal, and Ashvath. These are the children of Japhlet.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Shamer; Ahi, and Rohgah, Jehubbah, and Aram.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of his brother Helem; Zophah, and Imna, and Shelesh, and Amal.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Zophah; Suah, and Harnepher, and Shual, and Beri, and Imrah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Bezer, and Hod, and Shamma, and Shilshah, and Ithran, and Beera.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Jether; Jephunneh, and Pispah, and Ara.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Ulla; Arah, and Haniel, and Rezia.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: All these were the children of Asher, heads of their father’s house, choice and mighty men of valour, chief of the princes. And the number throughout the genealogy of them that were apt to the war and to battle was twenty and six thousand men.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Now Benjamin begat Bela his firstborn, Ashbel the second, and Aharah the third,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Bela were, Addar, and Gera, and Abihud,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And these are the sons of Ehud: these are the heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Geba, and they removed them to Manahath:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Naaman, and Ahiah, and Gera, he removed them, and begat Uzza, and Ahihud.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Shaharaim begat children in the country of Moab, after he had sent them away; Hushim and Baara were his wives.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And he begat of Hodesh his wife, Jobab, and Zibia, and Mesha, and Malcham,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Jeuz, and Shachia, and Mirma. These were his sons, heads of the fathers.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of Hushim he begat Abitub, and Elpaal.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Elpaal; Eber, and Misham, and Shamed, who built Ono, and Lod, with the towns thereof:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Beriah also, and Shema, who were heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Aijalon, who drove away the inhabitants of Gath:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Zebadiah, and Arad, and Ader,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Michael, and Ispah, and Joha, the sons of Beriah;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hezeki, and Heber,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Ishmerai also, and Jezliah, and Jobab, the sons of Elpaal;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Jakim, and Zichri, and Zabdi,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Elienai, and Zilthai, and Eliel,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, the sons of Shimhi;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ishpan, and Heber, and Eliel,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Abdon, and Zichri, and Hanan,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Hananiah, and Elam, and Antothijah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Iphedeiah, and Penuel, the sons of Shashak;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Jaresiah, and Eliah, and Zichri, the sons of Jeroham.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These were heads of the fathers, by their generations, chief men. These dwelt in Jerusalem.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And at Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon; whose wife’s name was Maachah:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And his firstborn son Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Nadab,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zacher.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Mikloth begat Shimeah. And these also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against them.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ner begat Kish, and Kish begat Saul, and Saul begat Jonathan, and Malchishua, and Abinadab, and Eshbaal.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the son of Jonathan was Meribbaal; and Meribbaal begat Micah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Micah were, Pithon, and Melech, and Tarea, and Ahaz.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ahaz begat Jehoadah; and Jehoadah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Moza begat Binea: Rapha was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son:

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Azel had six sons, whose names are these, Azrikam, Bocheru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Eshek his brother were, Ulam his firstborn, Jehush the second, and Eliphelet the third.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Ulam were mighty men of valour, archers, and had many sons, and sons’ sons, an hundred and fifty. All these are of the sons of Benjamin.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: So all Israel were reckoned by genealogies; and, behold, they were written in the book of the kings of Israel and Judah, who were carried away to Babylon for their transgression.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Now the first inhabitants that dwelt in their possessions in their cities were, the Israelites, the priests, Levites, and the Nethinims.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And in Jerusalem dwelt of the children of Judah, and of the children of Benjamin, and of the children of Ephraim, and Manasseh;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Uthai the son of Ammihud, the son of Omri, the son of Imri, the son of Bani, of the children of Pharez the son of Judah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of the Shilonites; Asaiah the firstborn, and his sons.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of the sons of Zerah; Jeuel, and their brethren, six hundred and ninety.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of the sons of Benjamin; Sallu the son of Meshullam, the son of Hodaviah, the son of Hasenuah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ibneiah the son of Jeroham, and Elah the son of Uzzi, the son of Michri, and Meshullam the son of Shephathiah, the son of Reuel, the son of Ibnijah;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And their brethren, according to their generations, nine hundred and fifty and six. All these men were chief of the fathers in the house of their fathers.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of the priests; Jedaiah, and Jehoiarib, and Jachin,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Azariah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the ruler of the house of God;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Adaiah the son of Jeroham, the son of Pashur, the son of Malchijah, and Maasiai the son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And their brethren, heads of the house of their fathers, a thousand and seven hundred and threescore; very able men for the work of the service of the house of God.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of the Levites; Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, of the sons of Merari;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Bakbakkar, Heresh, and Galal, and Mattaniah the son of Micah, the son of Zichri, the son of Asaph;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Obadiah the son of Shemaiah, the son of Galal, the son of Jeduthun, and Berechiah the son of Asa, the son of Elkanah, that dwelt in the villages of the Netophathites.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the porters were, Shallum, and Akkub, and Talmon, and Ahiman, and their brethren: Shallum was the chief;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Who hitherto waited in the king’s gate eastward: they were porters in the companies of the children of Levi.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Shallum the son of Kore, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah, and his brethren, of the house of his father, the Korahites, were over the work of the service, keepers of the gates of the tabernacle: and their fathers, being over the host of the LORD, were keepers of the entry.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Phinehas the son of Eleazar was the ruler over them in time past, and the LORD was with him.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Zechariah the son of Meshelemiah was porter of the door of the tabernacle of the congregation.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: All these which were chosen to be porters in the gates were two hundred and twelve. These were reckoned by their genealogy in their villages, whom David and Samuel the seer did ordain in their set office.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: So they and their children had the oversight of the gates of the house of the LORD, namely, the house of the tabernacle, by wards.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: In four quarters were the porters, toward the east, west, north, and south.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And their brethren, which were in their villages, were to come after seven days from time to time with them.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: For these Levites, the four chief porters, were in their set office, and were over the chambers and treasuries of the house of God.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they lodged round about the house of God, because the charge was upon them, and the opening thereof every morning pertained to them.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And certain of them had the charge of the ministering vessels, that they should bring them in and out by tale.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Some of them also were appointed to oversee the vessels, and all the instruments of the sanctuary, and the fine flour, and the wine, and the oil, and the frankincense, and the spices.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And some of the sons of the priests made the ointment of the spices.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Mattithiah, one of the Levites, who was the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, had the set office over the things that were made in the pans.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And other of their brethren, of the sons of the Kohathites, were over the shewbread, to prepare it every sabbath.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And these are the singers, chief of the fathers of the Levites, who remaining in the chambers were free: for they were employed in that work day and night.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These chief fathers of the Levites were chief throughout their generations; these dwelt at Jerusalem.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And in Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon, Jehiel, whose wife’s name was Maachah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And his firstborn son Abdon, then Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Ner, and Nadab,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zechariah, and Mikloth.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Mikloth begat Shimeam. And they also dwelt with their brethren at Jerusalem, over against their brethren.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ner begat Kish; and Kish begat Saul; and Saul begat Jonathan, and Malchishua, and Abinadab, and Eshbaal.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the son of Jonathan was Meribbaal: and Meribbaal begat Micah.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the sons of Micah were, Pithon, and Melech, and Tahrea, and Ahaz.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ahaz begat Jarah; and Jarah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Moza begat Binea; and Rephaiah his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Azel had six sons, whose names are these, Azrikam, Bocheru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan: these were the sons of Azel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Now the Philistines fought against Israel; and the men of Israel fled from before the Philistines, and fell down slain in mount Gilboa.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the Philistines followed hard after Saul, and after his sons; and the Philistines slew Jonathan, and Abinadab, and Malchishua, the sons of Saul.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the battle went sore against Saul, and the archers hit him, and he was wounded of the archers.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Then said Saul to his armourbearer, Draw thy sword, and thrust me through therewith; lest these uncircumcised come and abuse me. But his armourbearer would not; for he was sore afraid. So Saul took a sword, and fell upon it.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And when his armourbearer saw that Saul was dead, he fell likewise on the sword, and died.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: So Saul died, and his three sons, and all his house died together.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And when all the men of Israel that were in the valley saw that they fled, and that Saul and his sons were dead, then they forsook their cities, and fled: and the Philistines came and dwelt in them.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And it came to pass on the morrow, when the Philistines came to strip the slain, that they found Saul and his sons fallen in mount Gilboa.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And when they had stripped him, they took his head, and his armour, and sent into the land of the Philistines round about, to carry tidings unto their idols, and to the people.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they put his armour in the house of their gods, and fastened his head in the temple of Dagon.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And when all Jabeshgilead heard all that the Philistines had done to Saul,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: They arose, all the valiant men, and took away the body of Saul, and the bodies of his sons, and brought them to Jabesh, and buried their bones under the oak in Jabesh, and fasted seven days.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: So Saul died for his transgression which he committed against the LORD, even against the word of the LORD, which he kept not, and also for asking counsel of one that had a familiar spirit, to enquire of it;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And enquired not of the LORD: therefore he slew him, and turned the kingdom unto David the son of Jesse.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Then all Israel gathered themselves to David unto Hebron, saying, Behold, we are thy bone and thy flesh.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And moreover in time past, even when Saul was king, thou wast he that leddest out and broughtest in Israel: and the LORD thy God said unto thee, Thou shalt feed my people Israel, and thou shalt be ruler over my people Israel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Therefore came all the elders of Israel to the king to Hebron; and David made a covenant with them in Hebron before the LORD; and they anointed David king over Israel, according to the word of the LORD by Samuel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And David and all Israel went to Jerusalem, which is Jebus; where the Jebusites were, the inhabitants of the land.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the inhabitants of Jebus said to David, Thou shalt not come hither. Nevertheless David took the castle of Zion, which is the city of David.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And David said, Whosoever smiteth the Jebusites first shall be chief and captain. So Joab the son of Zeruiah went first up, and was chief.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And David dwelt in the castle; therefore they called it the city of David.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And he built the city round about, even from Millo round about: and Joab repaired the rest of the city.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: So David waxed greater and greater: for the LORD of hosts was with him.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These also are the chief of the mighty men whom David had, who strengthened themselves with him in his kingdom, and with all Israel, to make him king, according to the word of the LORD concerning Israel.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And this is the number of the mighty men whom David had; Jashobeam, an Hachmonite, the chief of the captains: he lifted up his spear against three hundred slain by him at one time.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And after him was Eleazar the son of Dodo, the Ahohite, who was one of the three mighties.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: He was with David at Pasdammim, and there the Philistines were gathered together to battle, where was a parcel of ground full of barley; and the people fled from before the Philistines.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they set themselves in the midst of that parcel, and delivered it, and slew the Philistines; and the LORD saved them by a great deliverance.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Now three of the thirty captains went down to the rock to David, into the cave of Adullam; and the host of the Philistines encamped in the valley of Rephaim.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And David was then in the hold, and the Philistines’ garrison was then at Bethlehem.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And David longed, and said, Oh that one would give me drink of the water of the well of Bethlehem, that is at the gate!

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And the three brake through the host of the Philistines, and drew water out of the well of Bethlehem, that was by the gate, and took it, and brought it to David: but David would not drink of it, but poured it out to the LORD,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And said, My God forbid it me, that I should do this thing: shall I drink the blood of these men that have put their lives in jeopardy? for with the jeopardy of their lives they brought it. Therefore he would not drink it. These things did these three mightiest.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Abishai the brother of Joab, he was chief of the three: for lifting up his spear against three hundred, he slew them, and had a name among the three.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Of the three, he was more honourable than the two; for he was their captain: howbeit he attained not to the first three.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, the son of a valiant man of Kabzeel, who had done many acts; he slew two lionlike men of Moab: also he went down and slew a lion in a pit in a snowy day.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And he slew an Egyptian, a man of great stature, five cubits high; and in the Egyptian’s hand was a spear like a weaver’s beam; and he went down to him with a staff, and plucked the spear out of the Egyptian’s hand, and slew him with his own spear.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These things did Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and had the name among the three mighties.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Behold, he was honourable among the thirty, but attained not to the first three: and David set him over his guard.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Also the valiant men of the armies were, Asahel the brother of Joab, Elhanan the son of Dodo of Bethlehem,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Shammoth the Harorite, Helez the Pelonite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Ira the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite, Abiezer the Antothite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Sibbecai the Hushathite, Ilai the Ahohite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Maharai the Netophathite, Heled the son of Baanah the Netophathite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Ithai the son of Ribai of Gibeah, that pertained to the children of Benjamin, Benaiah the Pirathonite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Hurai of the brooks of Gaash, Abiel the Arbathite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Azmaveth the Baharumite, Eliahba the Shaalbonite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The sons of Hashem the Gizonite, Jonathan the son of Shage the Hararite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Ahiam the son of Sacar the Hararite, Eliphal the son of Ur,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Hepher the Mecherathite, Ahijah the Pelonite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Hezro the Carmelite, Naarai the son of Ezbai,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Joel the brother of Nathan, Mibhar the son of Haggeri,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Zelek the Ammonite, Naharai the Berothite, the armourbearer of Joab the son of Zeruiah,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Ira the Ithrite, Gareb the Ithrite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Uriah the Hittite, Zabad the son of Ahlai,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Adina the son of Shiza the Reubenite, a captain of the Reubenites, and thirty with him,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Hanan the son of Maachah, and Joshaphat the Mithnite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Uzzia the Ashterathite, Shama and Jehiel the sons of Hothan the Aroerite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Jediael the son of Shimri, and Joha his brother, the Tizite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Eliel the Mahavite, and Jeribai, and Joshaviah, the sons of Elnaam, and Ithmah the Moabite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Eliel, and Obed, and Jasiel the Mesobaite.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Now these are they that came to David to Ziklag, while he yet kept himself close because of Saul the son of Kish: and they were among the mighty men, helpers of the war.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: They were armed with bows, and could use both the right hand and the left in hurling stones and shooting arrows out of a bow, even of Saul’s brethren of Benjamin.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The chief was Ahiezer, then Joash, the sons of Shemaah the Gibeathite; and Jeziel, and Pelet, the sons of Azmaveth; and Berachah, and Jehu the Antothite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Ismaiah the Gibeonite, a mighty man among the thirty, and over the thirty; and Jeremiah, and Jahaziel, and Johanan, and Josabad the Gederathite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Eluzai, and Jerimoth, and Bealiah, and Shemariah, and Shephatiah the Haruphite,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Elkanah, and Jesiah, and Azareel, and Joezer, and Jashobeam, the Korhites,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Joelah, and Zebadiah, the sons of Jeroham of Gedor.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of the Gadites there separated themselves unto David into the hold to the wilderness men of might, and men of war fit for the battle, that could handle shield and buckler, whose faces were like the faces of lions, and were as swift as the roes upon the mountains;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Ezer the first, Obadiah the second, Eliab the third,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Mishmannah the fourth, Jeremiah the fifth,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Attai the sixth, Eliel the seventh,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Johanan the eighth, Elzabad the ninth,

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Jeremiah the tenth, Machbanai the eleventh.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These were of the sons of Gad, captains of the host: one of the least was over an hundred, and the greatest over a thousand.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: These are they that went over Jordan in the first month, when it had overflown all his banks; and they put to flight all them of the valleys, both toward the east, and toward the west.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And there came of the children of Benjamin and Judah to the hold unto David.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And David went out to meet them, and answered and said unto them, If ye be come peaceably unto me to help me, mine heart shall be knit unto you: but if ye be come to betray me to mine enemies, seeing there is no wrong in mine hands, the God of our fathers look thereon, and rebuke it.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Then the spirit came upon Amasai, who was chief of the captains, and he said, Thine are we, David, and on thy side, thou son of Jesse: peace, peace be unto thee, and peace be to thine helpers; for thy God helpeth thee. Then David received them, and made them captains of the band.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And there fell some of Manasseh to David, when he came with the Philistines against Saul to battle: but they helped them not: for the lords of the Philistines upon advisement sent him away, saying, He will fall to his master Saul to the jeopardy of our heads.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: As he went to Ziklag, there fell to him of Manasseh, Adnah, and Jozabad, and Jediael, and Michael, and Jozabad, and Elihu, and Zilthai, captains of the thousands that were of Manasseh.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And they helped David against the band of the rovers: for they were all mighty men of valour, and were captains in the host.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: For at that time day by day there came to David to help him, until it was a great host, like the host of God.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And these are the numbers of the bands that were ready armed to the war, and came to David to Hebron, to turn the kingdom of Saul to him, according to the word of the LORD.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: The children of Judah that bare shield and spear were six thousand and eight hundred, ready armed to the war.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Of the children of Simeon, mighty men of valour for the war, seven thousand and one hundred.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Of the children of Levi four thousand and six hundred.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Jehoiada was the leader of the Aaronites, and with him were three thousand and seven hundred;

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And Zadok, a young man mighty of valour, and of his father’s house twenty and two captains.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of the children of Benjamin, the kindred of Saul, three thousand: for hitherto the greatest part of them had kept the ward of the house of Saul.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of the children of Ephraim twenty thousand and eight hundred, mighty men of valour, famous throughout the house of their fathers.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of the half tribe of Manasseh eighteen thousand, which were expressed by name, to come and make David king.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of the children of Issachar, which were men that had understanding of the times, to know what Israel ought to do; the heads of them were two hundred; and all their brethren were at their commandment.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: Of Zebulun, such as went forth to battle, expert in war, with all instruments of war, fifty thousand, which could keep rank: they were not of double heart.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of Naphtali a thousand captains, and with them with shield and spear thirty and seven thousand.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of the Danites expert in war twenty and eight thousand and six hundred.

translations.name: King James Version
translations.text: And of Asher, such as went forth to battle, expert in war, forty thousand.
